title: Calling for support after destruction of over 100 structures in fires
description: PLETTENBERG BAY AND SEDGEFIELD NEWS - More...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY AND SEDGEFIELD NEWS - More than a 100 structures burned down in two separate fires in the early hours of this morning - one in Bossiesgif in Plettenberg Bay and the other in Smutsville, Sedgefield.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY AND SEDGEFIELD NEWS - More than a 100 structures burned down in two separate fires in the early hours of this morning - one in Bossiesgif in Plettenberg Bay and the other in Smutsville, Sedgefield."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Early estimates indicate a total of about 110 structures were destroyed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Bossiesgif fire was described by the Dignity Garden Route NPC as the worst in three years. It started shortly after 01:00 this morning, 4 August. About 600 people are estimated to have been displaced.","html":"The Bossiesgif fire was described by the Dignity Garden Route NPC as the worst in three years. It started shortly after 01:00 this morning, 4 August. About 600 people are estimated to have been displaced."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"About 10 families lost their homes and possessions in the fire that swept through Smutsville in Sedgefield this morning.","html":"About 10 families lost their homes and possessions in the fire that swept through Smutsville in Sedgefield this morning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two years ago a similar fire in Smutsville, about 25 families lost their homes.","html":"Two years ago a similar fire in Smutsville, about 25 families lost their homes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No injuries","html":"No injuries"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A statement by Andile Sakati, Acting Head of Bitou Community Services, said the fire and rescue services were dispatched from the main fire station at 01:11, with additional support from Kurland crews and a request for assistance from the Knysna Municipality.","html":"A statement by Andile Sakati, Acting Head of Bitou Community Services, said the fire and rescue services were dispatched from the main fire station at 01:11, with additional support from Kurland crews and a request for assistance from the Knysna Municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No injuries or fatalities have been reported, said the statement.","html":"No injuries or fatalities have been reported, said the statement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A total of 13 fire personnel and seven vehicles were deployed to contain the blaze.","html":"A total of 13 fire personnel and seven vehicles were deployed to contain the blaze."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Despite challenging conditions - including difficult terrain, limited access, and strong winds - firefighters managed to contain the fire by 03:30,” said the statement.","html":"“Despite challenging conditions - including difficult terrain, limited access, and strong winds - firefighters managed to contain the fire by 03:30,” said the statement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Response and relief efforts","html":"Response and relief efforts"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Disaster management, housing, electrical and social services teams were activated to assist affected residents.","html":"Disaster management, housing, electrical and social services teams were activated to assist affected residents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Relief efforts include:","html":"Relief efforts include:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"- Distribution of blankets, mattresses and food parcels","html":"- Distribution of blankets, mattresses and food parcels"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"- Assessment of damaged structures and headcounts","html":"- Assessment of damaged structures and headcounts"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"- Support with rebuilding materials and documentation recovery, such as ID books","html":"- Support with rebuilding materials and documentation recovery, such as ID books"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cause of the fire at Bossiesgif remains unknown at this stage. The police have been notified and will conduct an investigation.","html":"The cause of the fire at Bossiesgif remains unknown at this stage. The police have been notified and will conduct an investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Emergency personnel on the scene of the Bossiesgif informal settlement fire.","html":"Emergency personnel on the scene of the Bossiesgif informal settlement fire. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Drop-off address","html":"Drop-off address"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On social media, Dignity Garden Route NPC said it was in urgent need of the following: blankets, men’s clothing (small to medium), kids clothing (all sizes), baby formula, baby clothes and women’s clothing (all sizes).","html":"On social media, Dignity Garden Route NPC said it was in urgent need of the following: blankets, men’s clothing (small to medium), kids clothing (all sizes), baby formula, baby clothes and women’s clothing (all sizes)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Also needed for hygiene purposes are: 5-litre buckets, toothpaste, toothbrushes, soap, washcloths, men’s deodorant and sanitary pads.","html":"Also needed for hygiene purposes are: 5-litre buckets, toothpaste, toothbrushes, soap, washcloths, men’s deodorant and sanitary pads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The drop-off address is Native Roots Shelter, corner of Marine Drive and Sea Witch Avenue in Plettenberg Bay.","html":"The drop-off address is Native Roots Shelter, corner of Marine Drive and Sea Witch Avenue in Plettenberg Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Volunteers","html":"Volunteers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cindy Truyens (079 474 6380) called for volunteers to help with food donations, preparation work and serving.","html":"Cindy Truyens (079 474 6380) called for volunteers to help with food donations, preparation work and serving."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We have three restaurants helping with meals tonight. But we need plates/bowls and spoons to serve the food,” she said. “We need make sandwiches now and would welcome your help. We also need bread, butter, sandwich fillings, water and cooldrinks.”","html":"“We have three restaurants helping with meals tonight. But we need plates/bowls and spoons to serve the food,” she said. “We need make sandwiches now and would welcome your help. We also need bread, butter, sandwich fillings, water and cooldrinks.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She also encouraged the public to drop off old/surplus crockery and cutlery at Native Roots Shelter.","html":"She also encouraged the public to drop off old/surplus crockery and cutlery at Native Roots Shelter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
